blended.narrative: Snoqualmie Pass is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.1 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 6,204 ft. Looking ahead, 64 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Sunday: 8" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 8" over the past week. Current depth: 28".
